title: Victor's Workshop 70pcs Shatterproof Christmas Baubles Pack, Frozen Winter Silver and White Christmas Ball Ornaments for Tree Decoration
features: гЂђOriginal DesignгЂ‘Victor's Workshop is a retail brand with original design. This set of Christmas baubles belongs to the Snow Castle theme. It applies white and silver to create a elegant and wintery atmosphere.

гЂђShatterproofгЂ‘Each Christmas ornament has sufficient thickness to prevent breakage. It remains intact even falling from 2 meters high onto hard floor.It is suitable for families with kids and pets.

гЂђExquisite CraftsmanshipгЂ‘ Christmas balls include 3 special finishes: shinny, matte, glitter. Multi-finish and novelty shape ornaments meet all of your favorite tree ornaments,and the molding seam is almost invisible to make it looks exquisite.
гЂђComplement to the ThemeгЂ‘70pcs baubles measure about 3-8cm. Matching our same theme of Christmas stocking, tree skirt, tree topper, wood hanging pendants, wood table decor, wreath and garland

гЂђFirm Cap & Pre-tied StringгЂ‘The sturdy plastic caps are designed to support weights of up to 335ml water. Each Ornament also comes with a pre-tied string and it is easy for you to hang it to the Christmas tree.

гЂђVersatile FunctionгЂ‘ Apart from being used as Christmas decorations, these ornaments serve a multiple purposes, making them perfect for other home applications, also ideal gifts for your friends in many occasions such as Party, Birthday and Festivals
гЂђReusableгЂ‘Due to good materials and craftsmanshipпјЊit can be reusable for several times.
